title: <div>If you could see the world through someone else’s eyes for a day, whose per
content:
If you could see the world through someone else’s eyes for a day, whose perspective would you choose, and why?


Week 5: Credible Sources & Argumentation

Day 17: Crafting a Persuasive Voice
📌 Instructions: Choose one of the prompts below to explore in depth.

🔹 Concrete Prompt:

Using Chapter 6 on Persuasive Essays, draft an opening paragraph for an argument-based essay. Ensure you establish a clear thesis statement and persuasive tone.

🔹 Abstract Prompt:

According to Chapter 3, Section 9, persuasion relies on logic, credibility, and emotional appeal. Which of these do you find most effective, and why?

🔹 Connecting Prompt:

Think of a time when a well-structured argument changed your perspective. How does persuasive writing play a role in shifting opinions?

🔹 Exploratory Prompt:

If you could convince the world of one thing, what would it be? How would you structure your argument to be most persuasive?
context: From document: Daily Journal Prompts | Weeks 1 - 6 | ENG 101 — chunk 13 (chunk 13/19)
